message:
test(ssh): add 10 runtime behavior tests for asupersync migration (ft-e34d9.10.5.3)

Verify that the frankenterm-ssh runtime abstraction layer works correctly
under the async-asupersync feature configuration:

- Channel bounded send/recv roundtrip, capacity-1, large batch ordering
- Multiple senders single receiver (MPMC compat)
- TryRecvError::Empty on empty channel
- RecvError on closed sender
- block_on with simple and nested futures
- IO trait types accessible under asupersync
- Sync→async bridge pattern (SessionSender simulation)

All 163 SSH crate lib tests pass (5 migration guards + 10 behavior + 148 existing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
